_comment: Curated User-Agent pool, preserved from the v1 core/user_agents.py. 'realistic: true' entries form the DEFAULT stealth rotation pool (they look like ordinary browser/mobile traffic and do not announce a scanner). 'realistic: false' entries are available for explicit opt-in but are NEVER used by default, because they trip basic IDS/IPS signatures. Seeded into the database on first run; see openspec/changes/add-seed-data.

user_agents.name: Chrome (Windows)
user_agents.value: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36
